issue: Dashboard hero selected a completed matchup-knowledge mission instead of the strongest seeded actionable leak into Mega Greninja.
recommendation: Re-rank mission candidates so the top hero prefers the strongest multi-game actionable leak over weaker recent tag patterns.

issue: The hero showed Mission complete and Pattern confirmed while the evidence copy still said the signal needs more games.
recommendation: Use one confidence source of truth so badge, progress, and evidence language cannot contradict each other.

issue: Matchups correctly surfaced Mega Greninja as the top actionable leak at 19 percent over 26 games.
recommendation: Keep this page as the reference implementation for actionable matchup coaching.

issue: Reward state is visually strong but still says the testing signal improved even when the mission is already complete and no quality signal was logged.
recommendation: Use softer completion-state copy once a mission is already complete or when the log sits outside the highest-value mission path.

issue: Authenticated matches page rendered nearly 1 MB of HTML with 100 matches and was the heaviest page in the audit.
recommendation: Paginate or window match cards and reduce default rendered detail per row.

issue: Deck overview loaded quickly and did not reintroduce remote Pokemon TCG enrichment.
Deck cards mix deck-total games with active-version read, which can be misread as one metric.
recommendation: Split deck-level sample and active-version sample into explicitly labeled metrics.

issue: Rogue Box correctly showed Manual archetype plus No clear archetype detected for version-level parser output.
recommendation: Keep manual deck identity primary and parser suggestion secondary.

issue: Unresolved and incomplete lists rendered safely without crashing the detail page.
recommendation: Add a stronger 60-card completeness warning in version create/edit if not already present.

issue: Authenticated route and reward state rendered, but the step-by-step flow could not be fully click-tested because browser automation was unavailable.
recommendation: Run a real browser pass on the guided flow with mobile and desktop viewports before inviting broader testers.

issue: Edit route loaded, but the full server-action edit interaction was not browser-verified in this environment.
recommendation: Run a signed-in browser edit pass on at least five matches and verify dashboard and matchup recalculation live.

issue: First-user and no-data states were not exercised with a clean second account during this audit.
recommendation: Run a separate clean-account pass for signup, onboarding, and empty analytics messaging.

issue: Interactive mobile viewport testing was not possible in this session.
recommendation: Run a phone-sized browser pass on dashboard, decks, matches, matchups, and guided logging.
